v1.letter_excerpt: The patient is working hard in rehabilitation and is capable of participating in the intensive program. The one instance of fatigue should not be the basis for this denial...

v3.letter_excerpt: The note cited in the denial was recorded during the patient's first therapy session, the day immediately following the stroke event. Updated daily logs show the patient has consistently completed two hours of intensive therapy per day since that single outlier session...

what_changed: Earlier drafts challenged the denial without identifying the specific note that was relied upon or explaining why it was unrepresentative.
The improved version pinpoints the outlier session, explains its temporal context, and directs the reviewer to the updated daily logs that contradict the denial's factual premise.
